environment_boundary: Windows x64 disposable loopback Local Monitor hosts, temporary SQLite databases, sanitized synthetic metadata, and repository-local Playwright Chromium; no genuine producer content capture.

active_rows.operation: typed receipt, evaluation, suppression, lifecycle, exact-evidence, recurring, pagination, restart, and explicit-evaluation flows
active_rows.expected_invariant: The bounded consumer uses only #80 typed projections and #83 lifecycle, fails closed on malformed or incomplete owner pages and source partitions, preserves exact evidence ownership, survives restart, exposes every matched UI page, and evaluates only after an explicit exact Session/trace request.

evidence.compatibility_basis: Candidate-pinned unit, route, restart, read-model, and Playwright fixtures exercise the frozen v1 interfaces with sanitized synthetic metadata.

active_rows.actual_result: At the exact candidate, the Alert Center/AlertLifecycle/MonitorOverview focused suite passed 106/106 with zero skips; #80 strict and Wave 3 consumer gates passed 49/49 and 33/33; #83 lifecycle owner gate passed 79/79; build passed with zero warnings/errors; and the full solution passed 7889/7889 with zero skips.

active_rows.operation: sanitized read/UI and same-origin explicit evaluation and lifecycle mutation boundaries
active_rows.expected_invariant: Every Alert Center response remains metadata-only and no-store; non-loopback Host, cross-site reads, cross-site or CSRF-free mutation, malformed requests, stale revisions, and evidence identity or source-partition mismatches fail closed without raw content or silent overwrite.

evidence.compatibility_basis: Candidate-pinned HTTP and Chromium tests cover raw-default and sanitized-only surfaces, negative Host/origin/CSRF/query/body cases, inert captured markup, lifecycle conflicts, and unavailable evidence.

active_rows.actual_result: The exact candidate passed the 106-case focused UI/security gate and 7889-case full suite with zero skips; sanitized-only rendering, inert text insertion, no-store responses, Host/origin/CSRF rejection, stale revision handling, raw/path/token no-leak cases, and missing/expired/unknown evidence states were preserved.

active_rows.operation: genuine positive alert receipt generation and Alert Center display for GitHub Copilot and Claude Code
active_rows.expected_invariant: A genuine positive alert is claimed only after a named reviewed #61 source/version manifest authorizes every required frozen rule capability and an exact provider Session/trace evaluation persists a canonical receipt that the Alert Center reads back.

evidence.compatibility_basis: The candidate-local live gate was stopped before provider execution because the frozen #61 source/version authority has no named reviewed adapter that grants the required Alert Center capabilities for either provider.

active_rows.actual_result: No genuine provider evaluation was started. The frozen #61 compatibility authority exposes no named reviewed source/version adapter that grants the required Alert Center rule capabilities to GitHub Copilot or Claude Code, so positive alert generation for both providers remains unverified.
active_rows.blocker: No named #61 manifest/source-version adapter authorizes the required Alert Center rule capabilities for GitHub Copilot or Claude Code.
active_rows.retry_condition: Promote a named reviewed #61 source/version mapping with the required capabilities, then rerun exact explicit evaluation and receipt readback for both providers on a newly frozen candidate.
active_rows.unverified_capability: Genuine positive alert receipt generation and Alert Center display for both GitHub Copilot and Claude Code.
